category_sources: Official Tarsnap spiped page describes encrypted and authenticated pipes between socket addresses.
source_facts.description says spiped is a secure pipe daemon.
display_name_sources: Official Tarsnap page names the project spiped.
docs_sources: Official Tarsnap spiped page provides description, example usage, project information, mailing list, and official releases.
repo_sources: Official Tarsnap spiped page says development takes place in the spiped git repository.
Tarsnap mailing-list announcement by Colin Percival states the spiped source repository moved to https://github.com/Tarsnap/spiped.
tags_sources: Official Tarsnap page describes symmetrically encrypted and authenticated pipes between socket addresses.
